description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Benea brand fusilli pasta, predominantly blue in color with white and yellow accents. The front face features the brand name 'BENEA' in large white letters, an image of fusilli pasta, and a transparent window revealing the pasta inside. The back of the box provides detailed cooking instructions, a recipe suggestion, and nutritional information, all in Spanish. The side panels include additional product information, ingredients, and a brief description of the brand's quality standards. The box appears sturdy and is designed to stand upright, with a sealed top and bottom to keep the pasta fresh.
description: A blue rectangular cardboard box of Benea fusilli pasta with a transparent window and detailed labeling, designed to stand upright.
description_view_0: The front view shows the brand name 'BENEA', a fusilli pasta image, a transparent window displaying the pasta, and product details.
description_view_1: The left side view displays nutritional information, ingredients, and the product name in a vertical layout.
description_view_2: The back view features cooking instructions, a recipe, and additional product information in Spanish, along with a food image.
description_view_3: The right side view provides a description of the product's quality and freshness, with branding and text in a vertical format.
attribute_labeling: Front: BENEA logo, fusilli image, transparent window, product name, weight, and cooking time. Sides: nutritional information, ingredients, product description. Back: cooking instructions, recipe, and food image.
attribute_placement: standing upright on a flat surface
